adapter_reattestation.repair_scope: project operation-conditional parameters through current public action_schema bounds, choices, constraints, and validate_action without hidden state

claim_boundary: Source-bound public Train/Dev PPO learning preflight only; this is neither full-matrix method readiness nor formal Bench evidence.

preregistered_gate.failure_action: write fail-closed report and do not start the full PPO matrix
preregistered_gate.task_learning_signal: trained behavior-complete count exceeds step-0, or trained mean episode-best primary metric improves by at least the frozen task SESOI
